meta.name: Generate an AI YouTube trend report with GPT-4o, Google Sheets and PDF.co

name: AI YouTube Trend Intelligence Report TEMPLATE

parameters.jsCode:
const keywords = [
  'AI automation 2025',
  'AI agents workflow',
  'n8n automation tutorial',
  'ChatGPT automation',
  'AI tools productivity',
  'LLM workflow builder',
  'no-code AI automation',
  'Make automation AI',
  'AI video creation',
  'artificial intelligence business'
];
const publishedAfter = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
return keywords.map(keyword => ({ json: { keyword, publishedAfter } }));

parameters.content:
---
## Setup Guide
Follow these steps to get started:
1. **Set up the Trend Finder Form**
   Customize the form fields (Topic Name, Last How Many Days) in the **Form Trigger** node. This is how users input their niche and time range for trend analysis.

2. **Connect your [YouTube Data API](https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3)**
   Add your YouTube OAuth2 credentials in the **Get many videos** node and replace `Your Project API Key` in the **Get Data** HTTP Request node with your actual YouTube API key.

3. **Link your [Google Sheets](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/) account**
   Connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials in both the **Create spreadsheet** and **Append row in sheet** nodes to automatically generate trend reports.

4. **Configure the Engagement Rate Filter**
   Adjust the engagement rate threshold (currently set to 2%) in the **Engagement Rate Check** node based on your quality standards.

5. **Customize Video Filters**
   Modify the conditions in the **If** node to filter videos by minimum views (currently 1000+), time range, and exclude hashtag-heavy titles.

6. **Set Regional Preferences**
   Update the `regionCode` parameter in the **Get many videos** node (currently "US") to target specific geographic regions.

Once all connections are set, your workflow will **analyze YouTube trends, filter high-engagement videos, and generate automated spreadsheet reports** 🚀
---

# AI YouTube Trend Intelligence Report

### **What it does:**
Automatically discovers, ranks, and analyzes the top-performing AI & automation YouTube videos each week, delivering a branded PDF report and Google Sheets dashboard to your inbox.

### **Why it matters:**
Saves 4+ hours of manual research per week by surfacing trending topics, high-engagement content patterns, and actionable content recommendations for AI/automation creators.

### **How it works:**
- Searches YouTube Data API across 10 AI/automation keywords for the past 7 days
- Fetches detailed statistics and deduplicates ~500 videos
- Ranks by views, calculates engagement rates, and filters for relevance
- Exports top channels, videos, and keyword stats to a new Google Sheet
- Sends the ranked data to an AI model for trend analysis and content recommendations
- Generates a branded HTML report with charts, converts to PDF, and emails it

### **Setup steps:**
1. Add your **YouTube Data API v3** key as an HTTP Query Auth credential
2. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** for the spreadsheet export
3. Connect **OpenAI API** credential for the AI analysis node
4. Connect **PDF.co** credential for HTML-to-PDF conversion
5. Connect **Gmail OAuth2** and update the recipient email in "Send Report Email"
6. Test with a manual execution before enabling the weekly schedule

## Was this helpful? Get in touch!

[![clic](https://vptkuqoipqbebipqjnqw.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/Milo%20Bravo/seeAxWUupcOOXY5tntexZ_video.gif)](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)

### **Have Feedback, a Question, or a Project Idea?**

I've streamlined the way we connect. It all starts with one simple form that takes less than 10 seconds. After that, you'll chat with my AI assistant who will gather the key details and pass them directly on to me.

####  **[Start the conversation here](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)**

*   **Give Feedback:** Share your thoughts on this template—whether you found a typo, encountered an unexpected error, have a suggestion, or just want to say thanks!

Happy Automating!
[Milo Bravo](https://linkedin.com/in/MiloBravo/) | BRaiA Labs | Automation & BI Systems + AI Integration

## 1. Trigger & Keywords

Weekly cron fires every Monday at 7 AM. The Code node defines 10 AI/automation search keywords and calculates the 7-day lookback date.

## 2. YouTube Data Fetch

Searches the YouTube Data API v3 for each keyword (50 results each), deduplicates videos, batches IDs in groups of 50, and fetches full statistics including views, likes, comments, and duration.

## 3. Rank & AI Analysis

Ranks all videos by views, calculates engagement rates, extracts top channels and keyword distribution. Sends the top 20 videos to an AI model for trend analysis, topic detection, and content recommendations.

## 4. PDF Report & Email

Generates a branded HTML report with charts (QuickChart.io), converts to PDF via PDF.co, downloads the file, and emails it as an attachment with a Google Sheets link.

## 5. Google Sheets Export

Creates a new "YouTube Analytics 2026" spreadsheet with three tabs (Channel Stats, Top Videos, Weekly Summary), populates each with ranked data, then passes the spreadsheet URL back to the main pipeline.
